contact.success: Thanks for your message, I’ll be in touch soon!
contact.invalid_message: Message must be at least 10 characters.

hero.subtitle: Cybersecurity & Network/Python Programming Specialist
hero.paragraph1: Passionate about pentesting, offensive security and programming, I help companies and individuals identify, understand, and fix security flaws.
hero.paragraph2: I also create custom Python tools to automate cybersecurity and networking tasks.

about.title: About me
about.intro: With several years’ experience in cybersecurity, my name is Jean Yves (LeZelote). I explore all aspects of ethical hacking and network development.
about.main: A self-learner always on the lookout for new threats, I love to thoroughly analyze systems' security and automate vulnerability detection. My specialties: pentesting, Python development, and infrastructure security!
about.item5: • Keeping up with new vulnerabilities & threats
about.conclusion: My goal: to share knowledge, constantly improve my skills, and help build a safer digital world.
